mapper.select: SELECT currency AS reconKey, SUM(amount) AS reconVal FROM cma_transactions WHERE ref_type = #{refType} GROUP BY currency
SELECT currency AS reconKey, SUM(amount) AS reconVal FROM operating_cash_transactions WHERE ref_type = #{refType} GROUP BY currency
SELECT currency AS reconKey, balance AS reconVal FROM operating_cash_balances
SELECT currency AS reconKey, SUM(amount) AS reconVal FROM deposit_transactions WHERE ref_type = #{refType} GROUP BY currency
SELECT stock_code AS reconKey, SUM(quantity) AS reconVal FROM holdings GROUP BY stock_code
SELECT stock_code AS reconKey, (whole_qty + fractional_remainder) AS reconVal FROM operating_account
SELECT CAST(account_id AS CHAR) AS reconKey, SUM(amount) AS reconVal FROM deposit_transactions GROUP BY account_id
SELECT CAST(account_id AS CHAR) AS reconKey, balance AS reconVal FROM account_balances
SELECT CONCAT(cma_account_id, ':', currency) AS reconKey, SUM(amount) AS reconVal FROM cma_transactions GROUP BY cma_account_id, currency
SELECT CONCAT(cma_account_id, ':', currency) AS reconKey, balance AS reconVal FROM cma_balances
